items.title: Avoidance Humor Coloring Page (It’s Self Care Now)
items.description: If avoiding your problems feels like a strategy… you’re not alone. Funny goblin coloring page for chaotic self-care logic.

items.title: Self Care Meme Coloring Page (Questionable Choices 😂)
items.description: Not all self care is productive… and that’s fine. Printable goblin meme for people doing their best in weird ways.

items.title: Chaotic Goblin Core Coloring Page (Embrace the Mess)
items.description: Messy, chaotic, and somehow still comforting. A goblin-core printable for embracing imperfect coping habits.

items.title: Procrastination Coloring Page (I’ll Deal With It Later)
items.description: A perfect printable for chronic procrastinators. Goblin-style humor for putting things off… again.

items.keyword: funny printable wall art chaotic quote
items.title: Chaotic Funny Printable Wall Art (Bad Decisions Energy)
items.description: Print it, hang it, and fully commit to your questionable life choices. Goblin quote art for chaos-friendly spaces.
